Name: GENERAL_LOCATION_EVENT_PARAM_ST
Description: Defines a general spatial event or trigger volume with position, rotation, shape, and categorization metadata.

Fields.Name: Position: X
Fields.Description: World-space X coordinate of the event location.

Fields.Name: Position: Y
Fields.Description: World-space Y coordinate of the event location.

Fields.Name: Position: Z
Fields.Description: World-space Z coordinate of the event location.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X
Fields.Description: Rotation around the X-axis (pitch) in degrees or engine units.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y
Fields.Description: Rotation around the Y-axis (yaw) in degrees or engine units.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Z
Fields.Description: Rotation around the Z-axis (roll) in degrees or engine units.

Fields.Name: Shape Type
Fields.Description: Defines the geometric shape of the event area (e.g., sphere, box, capsule).

Fields.Name: Color: R
Fields.Description: Red component of the debug or visualization color (0–255 or normalized).

Fields.Name: Color: G
Fields.Description: Green component of the debug or visualization color.

Fields.Name: Color: B
Fields.Description: Blue component of the debug or visualization color.

Fields.Name: Scale: X
Fields.Description: Primary horizontal scale or radius of the event volume.

Fields.Name: Scale: Y
Fields.Description: Vertical extent of the event volume.

Fields.Name: Scale: Z
Fields.Description: Secondary horizontal scale or depth of the event volume.

Fields.Name: Memory Block ID
Fields.Description: Identifier linking this event to a memory or streaming block system.

Fields.Name: Category Type
Fields.Description: High-level classification of the event group or system.

Fields.Name: Category ID
Fields.Description: Specific identifier within the category type.
